title: Junior Business Development Manager at Gera Developments

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Gera Developments
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Gera Developments. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Patna-based team.

About Gera Developments:
Gera Developments is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gera Developments!
